text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's first three years in the Twinkle
Series come to an end after numerous successes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lined up, her trophies already look like a city
skyline. And her career is far from over...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, hahaha! I don't hear you gasping for air,
Cafe, but I don't see you getting any faster either!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon... I won't lose... I'll surpass you, and
reach my friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While locked in their fierce contest, the two get
faster and faster, breaking one record after
another. Until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before they know it, they're a source of
inspiration for countless runners.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Today's crowd is just as big as the last... So, what
did you want to discuss?

text_block_list.name: Runner A
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I wanted to ask you about running on
dirt. Truth is, I'm not very good at it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Running on dirt? I see...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I would say... don't overexert yourself. Glide
across the sand... like a swinging pendulum...

text_block_list.name: Runner B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, me next! See, I'm thinking about becoming a
front runner. Do you have any tips for me?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A front runner... That's not my specialty, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What's important... is awareness... of where you'll
leave the burden in your heart. The way you run is
simply an expression of that idea...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Does that help answer your questions... at all?

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would you... like to go have some coffee?

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: ...Sure!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: My, oh my. That Cafe makes quite the mentor, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I tend to prattle on and on. But you know what, speed is the name of the game. Speed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that's the crux of my research. I neither
know nor care about dirt races or tactics or any of
that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But Cafe brings out the best in everyone. That
spiritual advice she gives consistently gets results.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It would seem that, in terms of versatility, she has
me beat.

text_block_list.name: Runner A
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Cafe, this coffee is so delicious.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hey now... Don't just guzzle it down in a hurry.
Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And it looks like she's having a blast, too. She's
practically got her feet up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...I think I get it. We're different on a fundamental
level. That's the key disparity.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Manhattan. A place filled with rows of towering high-rises. You'd think from a glance that height was the priority...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But perhaps prosperity was really the goal.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Could I make another request?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try out a new style of running today. It
might prove useful... for certain people...
choice_data_list: Is this for the younger students?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Recently, I've been thinking... While catching
up to my friend is very important to me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I also want to keep supporting those who are
trying to catch up to me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm... not as fast as my friend... but still, if I could
help in secret, from the shadows...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I would quietly hold out my hands... and be of
support to all Umamusume. That's my goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I see an image overlap with Manhattan
Cafe's body...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The word "friend" crosses my mind... I've never
seen her myself, but...
choice_data_list: Hey, where's your friend right now?
Hey, where's your friend right now?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend? She's here, of course. Right beside
me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's strange... She was just here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I hear... the voice of her lineage. The
voice of the Umamusume lineage itself, passed
down endlessly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right, she's... She is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's a fable about a certain Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That Umamusume boasted almost unparalleled
speed, and apparently, she very much resembled
Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps... Manhattan Cafe was dreaming all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dreaming of that unparalleled Umamusume, who
hoped for Manhattan Cafe to become her and to
surpass her.
